system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Endurance TN 6
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

You draw energy from the Zhe Valley Chrysanthemum and imbue its healing or harming properties into your blade, causing it to radiate gold and purple. This can only be used Cathartically. Requirement: To use this Technique you must maintain a vegetarian diet and consume no meat or blood. Eating even a small amount of meat will inhibit your ability to use this Technique for 24 hours. Cathartic: To use this Technique you must possess a Zhe Valley Chrysanthemum. Make an Endurance roll TN 6. On a Success you channel the harming energies of the flower into your blade and anyone struck by it takes 4 automatic Wounds. On a Failure, you channel the healing energies into your blade and anyone struck by it is healed by 4 Wounds. The Blade maintains this effect for two rounds plus one additional round for every Rank of Neigong. It is suggested that the GM secretly roll your Endurance on your behalf so you do not know the result.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
